title: Welcome
text:
Welcome to my research profile website. I’m a student in the Intro to Reproducible Data Analysis Using R course.


Replace this section with information about yourself:

Name: alya bakir
Institution: Haverford college
Research Interests: cell biology
Email: abaki@haverford.edu ## My Research

I’m interested in understanding blah blah. Through this course, I’ve learned how to:

Use R for data analysis
Create reproducible research workflows
Build websites to share my work
Manage my research projects with Git and GitHub




This site showcases my research and projects. Check out my Projects page to see my final report and other work!
As my research progresses, I’ll continue adding:

Publications
Conference posters
New analyses and projects
Additional resources


Keep exploring! Navigate using the menu above.

title: Projects
text:
Here are my research projects and work:


My final project for CELL 6351 - Intro to Reproducible Data Analysis Using R.
View Final Report →




As you continue your research journey, you can add more pages here! For example:

Conference posters
Publications
Data visualizations
Analysis write-ups
Project proposals

To add a new project:

Create a new .qmd file in the projects/ folder
Add a link to it on this page
Push to GitHub and your site updates automatically!
